description: Explore current ledger/audit storage, schemas, APIs, SSE watchers, and tests to plan migration to .fabric/events.jsonl.
focus: LEDGER_PATH AUDIT_LOG_FILE read-ledger audit-log ledger schemas /api/ledger /api/events watcher history replay
findings: Current storage is dual JSONL: .fabric/.intent-ledger.jsonl plus legacy fallback for LedgerEntry, and .fabric/audit.jsonl for get_rules/edit_intent/rule_selection. HTTP MCP EventStore also writes kind=mcp-event lines into the ledger file. /api/ledger and history replay consume readLedger; /events watches ledger/meta/lock/forensic, not audit. Migration needs .fabric/events.jsonl plus compatibility projections for ledger views, audit compliance windows, MCP replay, and SSE semantics.

description: Explore Fabric server MCP tools/services to identify where typed events should be recorded automatically, replacing explicit fab_append_intent.
focus: registerTool plan-context rule-sections append-intent tool lifecycle recordEvent typed events MCP services
findings: MCP registration is split across packages/server/src/tools/* and calls services directly. Existing writes are service-local: getRules appends get_rules audit, getRuleSections appends rule_selection, appendIntent writes ledger then edit_intent audit; planContext is readOnlyHint true but has no event write, updateRegistry has none. Implement shared recordEvent for .fabric/events.jsonl and instrument plan_context_requested, rule_sections_selected, intent_recorded/edit_intent_checked, deprecated tool usage with correlation/session ids.

description: Explore doctor, sync-meta, agents meta hash flow, and rule text source-of-truth path for baseline sync and drift acceptance.
focus: doctor sync-meta agents.meta hash drift baseline rule text source of truth doctor fix
findings: sync-meta is the rule-text compiler: reads bootstrap plus .fabric/agents/**/*.md, computes node hash/stable_id/identity_source and revision, and --check-only detects computed-vs-existing drift. doctor recomputes hashes/revision from agents.meta.json and reports stale meta/missing files/derived identities, but --fix only migrates legacy ledger. Event Ledger should record rule_drift_detected on explicit doctor audit/fix paths and rule_baseline_accepted when sync-meta updates meta; normal doctor reads stay non-mutating.

description: Explore CLI templates, protected tokens, tests, bootstrap docs, and command exports affected by explicitly deprecating fab_append_intent and fab_update_registry.
focus: fab_append_intent fab_update_registry protected tokens bootstrap templates CLI command tests docs deprecation
findings: fab_append_intent/fab_update_registry are hard-coded as core protocol in server tool registration, protected-token lint, bootstrap templates, docs, and hook warnings. Deprecation should keep/alias old MCP tools only if compatibility is required, remove them from bootstrap required-token policy, rewrite templates toward fab_plan_context+fab_get_rule_sections, sync-meta/doctor baseline acceptance, and typed events.jsonl. Update tests that inline old hard rules or assert tool/export behavior.
